mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.menu_type, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort, m.visible, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.menu_type, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort, m.visible, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort
